# AdaptiveOps

> AdaptiveOps helps industrial organizations achieve operational excellence through digital management systems, practical training and hands-on operational coaching. Built from the shop floor up.

## What we do

AdaptiveOps offers three integrated services:
- **Digital Solutions**: The ECO Platform — a modular industrial management system with 6 modules (EMS, QMS, MMS, PMS, OMS, CIS)
- **Training**: Professional programs in Lean Manufacturing, OEE, problem-solving, continuous improvement and leadership development
- **Coaching**: Hands-on shop-floor coaching for process optimization, management systems and team development

## Who we serve

Manufacturing and automotive organizations across Europe looking to reduce scrap, improve OEE, implement management systems and build cultures of continuous improvement.

## ECO Platform Modules

- **QMS** — Quality Management System (ISO 9001): Document control, CAPA, audit management, nonconformance, supplier quality, risk & FMEA
- **EMS** — Equipment Management System (ISO 55000): Asset registry, work orders, preventive maintenance, calibration, spare parts, condition monitoring
- **MMS** — Material Management System (DDMRP): Material master, Kanban, traceability, BOM management, WIP & flow control
- **PMS** — People Management System (ISO 45001): Training & competence, performance evaluation, org structure, workplace safety
- **OMS** — Operations Management System (TPS/Lean): Daily management, KPI cascading, production planning, OEE tracking
- **CIS** — Continuous Improvement System (Toyota Kata): Kaizen management, A3 problem solving, improvement projects

## Key Differentiators

- Built from real factory experience, not theory
- Integrates training + coaching + digital tools (most vendors offer only one)
- Modular: start with one system, add more as you grow
- Tier 1 (core) and Tier 2 (advanced) modules in each system
- Shared infrastructure: workflow engine, audit trail, reporting, API integration

## Services

- **Training Programs** (T1–T8): Lean Manufacturing, Problem Solving, Daily Management, OEE, Quality, Leadership, Toyota Kata, Train the Trainer
- **Coaching Programs** (C1–C5): Kata Coaching, Leadership Coaching, Operational Excellence Coaching, Team Coaching, Executive Coaching
